title: subworkflow - aws run ssm command on instances
description:
Subworkflow to execute SSM commands on EC2 instances for remediation or configuration changes

This subworkflow sends SSM commands to one or more EC2 instances and monitors execution status.

Parameters:

instanceIds: (Required) Comma-separated instance IDs or JSON array
commandDocument: (Required) SSM document name (AWS::EC2::Command, AWS::EC2::SoftwareInventory, etc.)
owsRegion: (Required) AWS region
commandParameters: (Optional) JSON object with command parameters
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection

Returns command execution ID and status
guide:
## 📝 **Subworkflow to Run SSM Commands on EC2 Instances**

🔧 This subworkflow sends SSM commands to EC2 instances for configuration changes, patching, or remediation without requiring SSH/RDP access.

Useful for running scripts, installing patches, and executing administrative tasks across multiple instances.

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **instanceIds** (Required): 🆔 EC2 instance IDs (JSON array or comma-separated)
- **commandDocument** (Required): 📋 SSM document name  
  *(Examples: `AWS-RunShellScript`, `AWS-RunPatchBaseline`)*
- **awsRegion** (Required): 🌍 AWS region
- **commandParameters** (Optional): 📊 JSON object with command parameters
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 AWS OIDC connection

---

### 📋 **Common SSM Documents**

| Document | Purpose | Use Case |
|----------|---------|----------|
| **AWS-RunShellScript** | Execute shell commands | Scripts, remediation |
| **AWS-RunPatchBaseline** | Install patches | Patching automation |
| **AWS-ConfigureAWSPackage** | Install packages | Software installation |
| **AWS-GetWindowsInstanceInformation** | Gather Windows info | Inventory |

---

### ✅ **Requirements**

✓ EC2 instances must be SSM-managed (IAM role + Systems Manager agent)
✓ Target instances must have network access to Systems Manager endpoints
✓ Command timeouts depend on document execution

---

### 🧠 **Usage Context**

- ✅ Patching automation
- ✅ Configuration management
- ✅ Remediation commands
- ✅ Bulk operational tasks

---

send-command.name: send-command
send-command.description: Send SSM command to EC2 instances
